concerns.text: Task T019 defines the target as 'Bulk_Modulus_Observed - Bulk_Modulus_Miedema' (residuals), and T032 evaluates this. However, Spec FR-002 and US-2 Acceptance Scenario 1 explicitly require the system to 'produce R², RMSE, and MAE for Bulk Modulus' (the absolute physical property). Predicting residuals is a semantic weakening of the requirement to predict the modulus itself, as the metrics would reflect the error of the residual model, not the direct prediction of the physical constant.

Task T030 implements a fallback to 'Leave-One-System-Out (LOSO)' if group count < 30. Spec US-2 and SC-003 mandate 'grouped bootstrap resampling' as the method for calculating confidence intervals. The spec does not authorize LOSO as a substitute for the bootstrap requirement; introducing this fallback in the tasks silently relaxes the statistical rigor mandated by the spec.

Task T041 schedules the 'Reference-Validator Agent' run in Phase 6 (Polish). The Plan (Phase 0) and Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) explicitly require this validation to occur as a 'blocking gate' before research begins. Scheduling it at the end violates the constitutional constraint that citations must be verified before contributing to the project's validity.
